title: rosa canina f. brachypoda
intro: Rosa canina f. brachypoda, also known as Dwarf Dog Rose, is a shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. brachypoda include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rosa canina f. brachypoda can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
